scenarios.label: Austerity
scenarios.description: Thin subsidy, thin cash. 600 riders and 90% farebox before day 35 without cratering.

scenarios.label: Pay the Bills
scenarios.description: 500 daily riders and farebox recovery above 60% within 30 days. Day 10 doubles demand in the densest district.

scenarios.label: Farebox Target
scenarios.description: Economic drill. Hit 80% farebox recovery with 400 daily riders before day 40.

scenarios.label: First Riders
scenarios.description: Cleveland, bus only. Carry 300 daily riders before day 45.

scenarios.label: Five Hundred
scenarios.description: Tutorial adjacent. Carry 500 daily riders on buses before day 50.

scenarios.label: Within Reach
scenarios.description: 800 daily riders and 7% coverage before day 40. Bus and tram from the start.

scenarios.label: Road Works
scenarios.description: Crisis. Survive the day 5 detour surge past day 22 with 700 riders and zero overcrowded routes.

scenarios.label: Tram Line
scenarios.description: Sandbox unlock. Bus and tram open. Reach 1000 riders and 7% coverage before day 45.

scenarios.label: Bus Spine
scenarios.description: New York, bus only. Carry 1500 daily riders with farebox at least 80% before day 45.

scenarios.label: Dig Season
scenarios.description: Crisis. Survive the day 8 dig surge past day 25 with 3000 riders and zero overcrowded routes.

scenarios.label: Express Grid
scenarios.description: Sandbox unlock. Bus and tram. Hit 2500 riders and 12% coverage before day 45.

scenarios.label: Cover Fares
scenarios.description: Economic drill. 1200 riders and 80% farebox recovery before day 40.

scenarios.label: First Thousand
scenarios.description: Tutorial adjacent. Carry 1000 daily riders on New York buses before day 40.

scenarios.label: Last Stand
scenarios.description: Brutal endgame. From day 30 hold 4000 riders, 100% farebox, and 12% coverage on a starved bus budget.

scenarios.label: Pressure Cooker
scenarios.description: Tight cash, locked buses. Hit 2000 riders, 100% farebox, and 10% coverage before day 50.
